zh.lifeSummary: Whitemal de Dalton是Roger de Dalton的女兒，於大約1120年出生在英國越可爾道爾頓。她與Roger de Aske結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1240年在英國英格蘭越可爾馬利可享年121歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Whitemal de Dalton是Roger de Dalton的女儿，于大约1120年出生在英国越可爾道爾頓。她与Roger de Aske结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1240年在英国英格兰越可爾馬利可享年121岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Whitemal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Native American (also White Man): translation into English (and shortening) of a personal name based on a word, such as Lakota Sioux wašiču(ŋ), meaning ‘white man’.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Weissmann  .

variants.name: Whitman
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Whytman (Old English Hwītmann, from hwīt ‘white’ + mann ‘man’). Compare White 1 and also Wightman , with which this surname was probably confused.
History: John Whitman settled in Weymouth, MA, c. 1638. The poet Walt Whitman (1819–92) was descended from Joseph Whitman, who had settled in Stratford, CT, from England around 1660.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Whitemal de Dalton was born about 1120, in Dalton, Yorkshire, England as the daughter of Roger de Dalton. She married Roger de Aske. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1240, in Marrick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 121.

fr.lifeSummary: Whitemal de Dalton est née environ 1120, à Dalton, Everwyck, Angleterre, fille de Roger de Dalton. Elle a épousé Roger de Aske. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1240, à Marrick, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 121 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Whitemal de Dalton(은)는 대략 1120년 영국 요르크실르 돌턴에서 Roger de Dalton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Roger de Aske(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 마릭에서 121세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Whitemal de Dalton родилась около 1120 г. в местности далтон, еркшир, Англия. Её отца звали Roger de Dalton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger de Aske. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1240 г. в местности маррикк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 121 год.
